ambiguous_intent:
Mujhe samajh nahi aaya aap kya karna chahte hain. Kya matlab hai:
1. Load post karna
2. Load dhundhna
3. Trip status check karna
4. Kuch aur?
ambiguous_material: Kya maal hai? (Steel, Coal, Cement, Grain, Sand, Chemicals...)
ambiguous_weight: Kitna weight hai tonnes mein? (jaise 25 tonne)
ambiguous_price: Rate kya hai? ₹ per tonne ya ₹ per trip mein bataein.
ambiguous_date: Kab? Date bataein (jaise kal, 25 March, agle Monday).
confirm_correction: Aapne {original} bola. Kya aapka matlab {corrected} hai?
too_vague:
Thoda aur detail mein bataein. Jaise:
• "Mumbai se Delhi load chahiye"
• "25 tonne steel ka load post karo"
• "Meri trip ka status batao"
